task_completion.description: Open SolveSpace and start a new sketch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace application window is visible with a blank canvas or a new 2D sketch initiated.

task_completion.description: Draw the bottom and top chords of the truss.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There are 3 horizontal line segments forming the bottom chord and 2 horizontal line segments forming the top chord visible on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Draw the diagonal web members to form a 3-bay Warren truss.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There are 6 diagonal line segments connecting the 4 bottom nodes and 3 top nodes in a zig-zag pattern, completing the 11-segment truss structure.

task_completion.description: Constrain the leftmost node to the origin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The leftmost node of the bottom chord is placed exactly at the intersection of the coordinate axes (the origin) and is constrained to it.

task_completion.description: Apply equal length constraints to all 11 segments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Equal length constraint indicators (such as '=' symbols or specific constraint colors/markers in SolveSpace) are visible on the segments, or the property browser shows equal length constraints applied across the truss.

task_completion.description: Set one segment to exactly 50 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distance/length dimension constraint showing '50' or '50.00' is visible on exactly one of the line segments in the sketch.

task_completion.description: Save the sketch to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or the application title bar shows the file being saved as 'warren_truss.slvs' in the '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the truss.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking tools, drawing lines, and applying constraints within the SolveSpace interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not generate the .slvs file by writing raw text/code.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors or terminal windows open where the agent is writing the raw SolveSpace file format directly.
The sequence of screenshots shows the progressive addition of lines and constraints, rather than the finished model appearing instantly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The final model must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/warren_truss.slvs'. It must contain exactly 11 line segments and 7 nodes (4 bottom, 3 top). The segments must form a 3-bay Warren truss. All 11 segments must be constrained to have equal lengths, and exactly one segment must have a length dimension constraint of 50.0 mm.
